institution.name: George C Wallace State Community College-Hanceville

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at George C Wallace State Community College-Hanceville fell 17% between 2007 and 2010 (37.2% → 30.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at George C Wallace State Community College-Hanceville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at George C Wallace State Community College-Hanceville rose 27% between 2009 and 2010 (9.6% → 12.2%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at George C Wallace State Community College-Hanceville are 17% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($39.8k vs $34.0k).
